UpdateLogShipper.destConfig.BOSPath: BOS path consisting of bucket name plus user-defined path, max 256 characters
UpdateLogShipper.destConfig.partitionFormatTS: Partition format, e.g. %Y/%m/%d/%H/%M/, supports up to minute level, customizable, can be empty, default is %Y/%m/%d/%H/%M/
UpdateLogShipper.destConfig.partitionFormatLogStream: Whether to use logstream as a partition level, default false
UpdateLogShipper.destConfig.maxObjectSize: Maximum object size in MB, range 1 - 5*1024*1024 (5TB), default 64
UpdateLogShipper.destConfig.compressType: Compression type, options: snappy/gzip/bzip2/lzop or no compression (none), default none
UpdateLogShipper.destConfig.deliverInterval: Delivery interval in minutes, integer between 5 and 60, default 5
UpdateLogShipper.destConfig.storageFormat: Storage format, options: parquet, json, csv, default json
UpdateLogShipper.destConfig.csvHeadline: Whether to include field names in CSV output, default false
UpdateLogShipper.destConfig.csvDelimiter: CSV delimiter, options: comma (,), space ( ), pipe (|)
UpdateLogShipper.destConfig.csvQuote: CSV quote character, options: single quote ('), double quote ("), none, customizable, default none
UpdateLogShipper.destConfig.nullIdentifier: Placeholder for null column values in CSV, default empty
UpdateLogShipper.destConfig.selectedColumnName: Required for CSV and Parquet; selected column names as comma-separated list
UpdateLogShipper.destConfig.selectedColumnType: Required for Parquet; selected column types as comma-separated list
UpdateLogShipper.destConfig.fieldsName: Field names selected when shipper type is kv, same size as fieldsType
UpdateLogShipper.destConfig.fieldsType: Field types selected when shipper type is kv, same size as fieldsName
UpdateLogShipper.destConfig.shipperType: Shipper type, default text; when delivering system fields the data is in JSON format; kv type delivers only specified key-value pairs in JSON format
